title: Add personas table + CRUD UI to congress.html

log.context: Add personas table + CRUD UI to congress.html

Done. Here's what was built:

**Personas tab** added to `/congress` at `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`:

**Tab navigation** - a `Sessions` / `Personas` tab bar now sits at the top of the center arena column. Clicking Personas hides the sessions view and shows the admin panel.

**Personas table** - columns: avatar (32px img or emoji fallback), Name + slug, Model (abbreviated monospace badge using the existing `shortenModel()` function), Role, Status pill (active/severance), Congress count, ...(truncated)
